task_completion.description: The 'MRI Stack' sample image is opened in Fiji.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window titled 'mri-stack.tif' (or similar) showing a grayscale head MRI scan is visible in the Fiji interface.

task_completion.description: The MRI Stack is navigated to axial slice 15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scrollbar/slider at the bottom of the image window shows '15/27', or the slice indicator explicitly shows that slice 15 is active.

task_completion.description: Three distinct Regions of Interest (ROIs) are defined on the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ROI Manager' window is open and lists at least 3 ROIs, or multiple distinct selection outlines (e.g., yellow polygons/circles) are visible on different parts of the brain image.

task_completion.description: Measurements for Mean Intensity, Standard Deviation, and an additional texture metric are taken for the ROIs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fiji 'Results' window is visible, displaying at least 3 rows of data. The columns must include 'Mean', 'StdDev', and at least one additional metric such as 'Skew', 'Kurt' (Kurtosis), or 'Entropy'.

task_completion.description: Measurements are compiled into a table that includes specific region labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet, text editor, or terminal output shows the CSV data containing the text labels 'White Matter', 'Gray Matter', and 'CSF' (or Cerebrospinal Fluid) alongside the numerical measurement data.

task_completion.description: The results are saved as a CSV file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'texture_analysis.csv' in the 'ImageJ_Data/results' folder, or a terminal/file explorer confirms the file exists at '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/texture_analysis.csv'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the image analysis rather than writing a script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Fiji menus (e.g., Analyze > Set Measurements), the ROI Manager, and native toolbars.

integrity.description: The measurement values in the results table appear to be genuinely calculated from the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical values for Mean and StdDev in the results table are precise floating-point numbers that differ across the 3 regions, rather than mocked, identical, or simplistic integers.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type out a mock CSV from scratch without performing the measurements in Fiji.
integrity.visual_evidence: The native Fiji 'Results' window containing the raw numerical data must be visible in at least one screenshot before the final CSV is edited or saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the 'MRI Stack' built-in sample in Fiji. The agent must define exactly 3 distinct regions (White Matter, Gray Matter, CSF). The results must be saved to '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/texture_analysis.csv'. The results table should contain at least 3 rows of measurements. Standard deviation variance across regions must exceed 0.5 to ensure different tissues exhibit distinct texture properties.
